name: amazon-products-mcp
description: Search for products and get detailed product information from Amazon. Supports multiple regional Amazon sites.

region.title: Default Region
region.description: Default Amazon region (e.g. us, uk, de). Can be overridden per request.

tools.name: list_regions
tools.description: List all supported Amazon regions with IDs, names, and currencies

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products on Amazon by keyword

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed product info by ASIN (price, features, rating, description)
